---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with Open Content Machine
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

**Do not paste personal data or file contents from `data/private/` anywhere
in this issue.** If reproducing the bug requires real data, describe the
shape of the data (columns, row count, encoding) instead of pasting actual
rows, or reproduce it with a synthetic CSV and attach that instead.

## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Command run (e.g. `content-machine audience validate ...`)
2. Input used (synthetic data or a description of the input's shape — never
   real personal data)
3. What happened

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version:
- Open Content Machine version / commit:

## Additional context

Logs or tracebacks are welcome, but check first that they do not contain any
personal data or secrets before pasting them.
